case_title: KARL CRAIG VS. CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRAIG, KARL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,188.00 FILED BY CRAIG, KARL AS TO DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JULIUS WILSON-KERMAH--PROPERTY SUPERVISOR AND GRIVEL MORA--SITE DIRECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
